---
title: "Data Exploration and Fasting Glucose Quality Assessment"
---

## Data Loading and Preparation
```{python}
import os
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
```

```{python}
# Show all rows
pd.set_option('display.max_rows', None)

# Show all columns
pd.set_option('display.max_columns', None)

# Show full cell content (stops long text from getting cut off)
pd.set_option('display.max_colwidth', None)
```

```{python}
load_dotenv()

dataset_path = os.getenv("CLEANED_DATASET_PATH")
if dataset_path is None:
    raise ValueError("CLEANED_DATASET_PATH is not set in the environment.")

df = pd.read_excel(dataset_path)
df.head()
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
total_population = len(df)
total_population_in_cc = df.groupby("City Corporation").count()['ID']['Chattogram City Corporation']
```

```{python}
df.groupby("Thana")["ID"].count().reset_index(name="Total_IDs")
```

```{python}
df["Thana_clean"] = (
    df["Thana"]
    .str.strip()
    .str.lower()
    .str.replace(r"\s*thana$", "", regex=True)
)
```

```{python}
mapping = {
    # Fatikchhari
    "fatikchari": "Fatikchhari",
    "fatickchori": "Fatikchhari",
    "fatikchhari": "Fatikchhari",

    # Banshkhali
    "bashkhali": "Banshkhali",
    "banshkhali": "Banshkhali",

    # Bakalia
    "bakolia": "Bakalia",
    "bakalia": "Bakalia",

    # Bayazid Bostami
    "baizid": "Bayazid Bostami",
    "bayazid": "Bayazid Bostami",
    "baizid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami",
    "bayezid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami",
    "bayazid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami",

    # Double Mooring
    "doublemooring": "Double Mooring",
    "double mooring": "Double Mooring",

    # Chawk Bazar
    "chowkbazar": "Chawk Bazar",
    "chawkbazar": "Chawk Bazar",

    # Pahartali
    "pahartoli": "Pahartali",
    "pahartali": "Pahartali",

    # Sitakunda
    "sitakundu": "Sitakunda",
    "sitakunda": "Sitakunda",

    # Chakaria
    "chokoria": "Chakaria",
    "chakaria": "Chakaria",

    # Mirsharai
    "mirsarai": "Mirsharai",
    "mirsharai": "Mirsharai",

    # Karnaphuli
    "karnafuly": "Karnaphuli",
    "karnafuli": "Karnaphuli",
    "karnaphuli": "Karnaphuli",

    # Halishahar
    "halisahar": "Halishahar",
    "halishahar": "Halishahar",

    # Jorargonj
    "jorarganj": "Jorargonj",
    "zorargonj": "Jorargonj",
    "jorargonj": "Jorargonj",

    # Akbar Shah
    "akbarshah": "Akbar Shah",
    "akbar shah": "Akbar Shah",

    # Patenga
    "potenga": "Patenga",
    "patenga": "Patenga",

    # EPZ
    "epz": "EPZ",

    # Khulshi
    "khulshi": "Khulshi",

    # Kotwali
    "kotwali": "Kotwali",

    # Panchlaish
    "panchlaish": "Panchlaish",

    # Chandgaon
    "chandgaon": "Chandgaon",

    # Bandor / Bandar
    "bandar": "Bandar",

    # Anwara
    "anowara": "Anwara",
    "anwara": "Anwara",

    # Sitakunda duplicate handled already
    # Raozan
    "raozan": "Raozan",

    # Rangunia
    "rangunia": "Rangunia",

    # Boalkhali
    "boalkhali": "Boalkhali",

    # Sandwip
    "sandwip": "Sandwip",

    # Lohagara
    "lohagara": "Lohagara",

    # Hathazari
    "hathazari": "Hathazari",

    # Cox's Bazar Sadar
    "cox's bazar sadar": "Cox's Bazar Sadar",

    # Khagrachhari Sadar
    "khagrachari sadar": "Khagrachhari Sadar",
    "khagrachhari sadar": "Khagrachhari Sadar",
}
```

```{python}
df["Thana_normalized"] = df["Thana_clean"].map(mapping)
```

```{python}
df["Thana_normalized"] = df["Thana_normalized"].fillna(
    df["Thana_clean"].str.title()
)
```

```{python}
# overwrite original column with normalized values
df["Thana"] = df["Thana_normalized"]

# drop helper columns
df = df.drop(columns=["Thana_clean", "Thana_normalized"])
```

```{python}
df.groupby("Thana")["ID"].count().reset_index(name="Total_IDs")

```

```{python}


print("Total Population:", total_population)
print("Population in CC:", total_population_in_cc)
print("Total Population outside CC:", total_population-total_population_in_cc)
```





```{python}
df.to_excel(dataset_path)
```
